inputs.label: First Unit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost or time required to produce the first unit (in any currency or hour unit). Serves as basis for learning curve calculation.

inputs.label: Learning Rate
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of cost retained when cumulative output doubles. Typical values range from 70% to 100% (no learning).

inputs.label: Unit Number
inputs.businessContext: The cumulative unit number for which the individual cost is estimated.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units in the production batch for total cost calculation.
